title: Supplemental Tools
description: It is a supplementary mod and provides several complementary equipment.
body: # 🛠️ Supplemental Tools ![Supplemental Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2049c7739578e57c2243c223491b9e3e4a1b2275_0.webp) *Expand your Minecraft arsenal with elegance and ingenuity.* --- ## 🌟 Overview **Supplemental Tools** introduces a collection of finely-crafted gear made from often-overlooked vanilla materials like **Copper**, **Amethyst**, and **Emerald**. Designed to blend seamlessly into the vanilla experience, these tools and armor sets don’t just look great—they come packed with subtle mechanics that encourage creative gameplay. ## 🔍 Key Features - **Unique Tool & Armor Sets** Forge weapons and armor from non-traditional materials like Copper and Amethyst, each bringing its own strengths and style. - **Set Bonuses with a Twist** Equip a full set to unlock special abilities—some even react to redstone signals, allowing for dynamic strategies and interactions. --- ## ✨ NEW (v2.1.0-) Vanilla tools you use all the time—now with staying **durablity**. Who wants to carry stack backups anyway? Not cool. ## 🎯 Perfect For Players Who: - Want to make better use of vanilla materials with meaningful upgrades - Enjoy exploring unique mechanics tied to armor sets - Are looking for a mod that feels like a natural extension of vanilla gameplay --- ### 📢 Please note: Supplemental Tools v2.0 is not compatible with earlier versions of the mod. This change was necessary due to significant design limitations in supporting Minecraft1.21.5 with the previous architecture. That said, the overall gameplay experience and item feel remain the same—just with a cleaner, more future-proof foundation. --- **Upgrade your adventures. Look sharp. Play smart. Supplement your tools.**
